      • measureGoalComplexity

        private int measureGoalComplexity(ImmutableList<TacletGoalTemplate> l)
        this is a rough estimation about the goal complexity. The complexity depends on the depth of the term to be replaced. If no such term exists we add a constant (may be refined in future)
